lobe.name: Svrn7.Email
lobe.title: SVRN7 Email LOBE
lobe.description: DIDComm-native email using RFC 5322 tunneling. Receives and sends email messages between TDAs without SMTP. From/To fields use did:drn identifiers. Inbound RFC 5322 payloads are extracted from the DIDComm body and stored in the Long-Term Message Memory.
lobe.author: Michael Herman

protocols.title: Inbound Email Message
protocols.description: Inbound RFC 5322 email tunneled over DIDComm. Body: { from: did, to: did, rfc5322Body: string }

protocols.title: Email Delivery Receipt
protocols.description: Delivery confirmation for a previously sent email.

protocols.title: List Emails Request
protocols.description: Query for stored email messages. Body: { limit?: int, correlationId?: string }. Replies with Get-PandoMails over WebSocket.

protocols.title: Send Email (from PandoMail UI)
protocols.description: Accepted from local PandoMail UI via TdaMailClient. Body: { recipientDid, subject, bodyText }. Wraps as RFC 5322 and delivers to recipient TDA.

protocols.title: Query TDA DID
protocols.description: Local UI request for this TDA's own DID. Body: { correlationId?: string }. Replies with Reply-TdaDid over WebSocket.

protocols.title: Get Email Body
protocols.description: Request for the full RFC 5322 body of a specific stored email message. Body: { messageDid: string, correlationId?: string }. Replies with Reply-EmailBody over WebSocket.

protocols.title: Resolve DID Document (PandoMail)
protocols.description: Local UI request to resolve a DID Document. Body: { requestedDid: string, correlationId?: string }. Tries local registry; escalates to parent TDA via plaintext did-resolve-request on miss. Replies with Reply-DidDocument over WebSocket.

protocols.title: List Sent Emails Request
protocols.description: Query for sent (outbound) email messages. Body: { limit?: int, correlationId?: string }. Replies with Get-PandoOutbox over WebSocket.

protocols.title: List Dead Letters Request
protocols.description: Query for pending dead-letter records (failed outbound deliveries). Body: { correlationId?: string }. Replies with Get-PandoDeadLetters over WebSocket.

protocols.title: Query Folder Counts
protocols.description: Sent by PandoMail on connect to populate folder tree count annotations from existing data. No body required. Replies with Notify-FolderCounts over WebSocket.

cmdlets.name: Dequeue-PandoMail
cmdlets.title: Receive Email
cmdlets.description: Processes an inbound email/1.0/message. Extracts RFC 5322 body, verifies sender DID from DIDComm envelope, returns an email record.

MessageDid.description: TDA resource DID URL of the inbox message. Form: did:drn:{networkId}/inbox/msg/{objectId}
TDA resource DID URL of the inbox message.

MessageId.description: LiteDB ObjectId hex of the inbox record.

SenderDid.description: Authoritative sender DID (from DIDComm envelope, not RFC 5322 From header).

cmdlets.name: Enqueue-PandoMail
cmdlets.title: Send Email
cmdlets.description: Sends an RFC 5322 email to a recipient DID via DIDComm. Returns an OutboundMessage for the Switchboard.

Body.description: Plain text body (Epoch 0: no MIME multipart).

From.description: Optional sender display string. Defaults to Society DID.

PeerEndpoint.description: HTTP/2 endpoint URL of the target TDA.

PackedMessage.description: JSON-serialised DIDComm message body (not yet packed — Switchboard packs before delivery).

MessageType.description: DIDComm @type URI of the outbound message.

ai._note: Epoch 0: these fields are informational for human and AI developers. inputSchema/outputSchema on each cmdlet are optional in Epoch 0. In a future epoch, an AI pipeline composer will consume this descriptor directly — possibly via an MCP-compatible tools/list interface — to discover, understand, and dynamically compose LOBE pipelines. The LOBE descriptor will become the MCP tool definition with no translation needed.
ai.summary: Handles all email communication between TDA citizens using DIDComm as the transport. No SMTP. Uses did:drn identifiers instead of email addresses.
useCases: Citizen-to-citizen messaging within a VTC7 mesh
compositionHints: Chain Dequeue-PandoMail after Dequeue-Svrn7Message for any pipeline handling email/1.0/* types
Use Enqueue-PandoMail to reply to an inbound email
SenderDid in the returned record is authoritative — not the RFC 5322 From header
Dequeue-PandoMail is idempotent: processing the same MessageDid twice is safe
limitations: Epoch 0 only: plain text body. No MIME multipart, no attachments.
Recipient must have a resolvable did:drn DID with a DIDComm service endpoint.
